name: Sweet- Sour Meat
recipeIngredient: 2/3 cup Chicken, turkey or meat broth
2/3 cup Cut-up cooked chicken, turkey, beef or pork
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut green pepper into 1-inch pieces.
2. Cook slowly in fat or oil in a heated frying pan about 10 minutes until tender.
3. Mix sugar and cornstarch.
4. Mix in broth, vinegar, and soy sauce; add to green pepper.
5. Cook over medium heat, stirring until the sauce is clear and thickened.
6. Add meat and raisins.
7. Heat through. Serves 2.
